title: BlackBerry Earnings Dates, Call Summary & Reports
text: BlackBerry's earnings history demonstrates improving profitability and strong revenue growth, particularly in its QNX and Secure Communications divisions. The company reported Q4 2026 earnings on April 9, 2026, beating expectations with EPS of $0.06 versus $0.04 estimated. Q4 revenue reached $156.0 million, up 10% year-over-year, with full-year revenue of $549.1 million, up 3% for the fiscal year. Net income improved to $24.3 million in Q4, marking the eighth consecutive quarter of profitability improvements. The next earnings call is scheduled for June 23, 2026. QNX delivered record Q4 revenue with 20% year-over-year growth and a $950 million backlog. Secure Communications returned to growth with 8% year-over-year revenue increase. FY2027 guidance projects revenue of $584-611 million with non-GAAP EPS of $0.15-0.19. Management cited the turnaround as complete and positioned the company as a growth story moving forward.
